problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Ketamine-like. Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
